# Boots review

New low boots, ~40 km in so far.

| Trait | Verdict |
| --- | --- |
| Grip on scree | Excellent — tested on the [Ridgeline Loop](../trails/ridgeline-loop.md) |
| Waterproofing | Held through the [May 17 rain](../daily/2026-05-17.md) |
| Break-in | Two walks, no blisters |
| Weight | Heavier than hoped |

Would buy again. On the [checklist](checklist.md) as permanent kit.
